creator: rhurlin@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 159384
patch to update GRASS dependency

After the update of databases/grass, its dependency in graphics/qgis has to be updated, too. Set PORTREVISION, to enforce a rebuild. 

Unfortunately until now, I am not aware of any method to avoid hard coding the GRASS version for CMAKE_ARGS. I would appreciate any help, thanks.

No functional change in graphics/qgis.
